curation_notes: Patch commit b1559f4 identified from advisory references (aubio/aubio@b1559f4). Only 1 source file changed: src/tempo/tempo.c (+4/-3). The fix increases the specdesc_func buffer from 20 bytes to PATH_MAX and replaces strcpy with strncpy plus null termination. Location derived directly from the patch diff: the vulnerable code is in new_aubio_tempo where tempo_mode is copied via strcpy into a 20-byte stack buffer. No sibling files (onset.c, pitch.c) contain the same vulnerability pattern. Vulnerability class buffer-overflow confirmed from CWE-119 and the patch clearly fixing an unbounded string copy into a fixed-size buffer.
